account.addBottom: New items go to the bottom by default
account.addBottomHelp: Your default position for new actions, projects, and inbox captures (off = top). You can flip it just for now with the top/bottom toggle beside each add box; that resets to this default.
account.dateFormatHelp: How due dates are displayed. Date entry is unaffected.
account.deleteDesc: This permanently removes your account and all your workspaces from the cloud — on the web and any synced device. Local desktop files on your own machine are not affected. This can't be undone.
account.deleteHelp: Permanently delete your account and all your cloud data. This can't be undone.
account.exportHelp: Download a JSON copy of all your workspaces.
account.inviteHelp: Share this link to invite someone to Nam — it opens straight to sign-up.
accountMenu.signUp: Sign up to keep your work
actions.deleteConfirmWithChildren: {count, plural, one {Delete "{title}" and its # item?} other {Delete "{title}" and its # items?}}
auth.consent: I'm 13 or older and agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.consentError: Please confirm you are 13+ and accept the Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.forgotInfo: If that email has an account, a password-reset link is on its way.
auth.forgotSub: We'll email you a reset link.
auth.resetSub: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.signupInfo: Check your email to confirm your account. If you already have one, sign in instead.
auth.tryDemo: Or try the demo — no account needed
backlog.emptyHint: Things to do later — not now. Park actions here, then promote them to Next when you're ready.
blocked.emptyHint: When you mark an action as waiting on a prerequisite, it shows here — grouped under what's blocking it.
bookmarks.renameDescription: The name is yours — renaming the bookmark doesn't touch the project or tags underneath.
capture.description: Add to your inbox. Keep typing to add several.
capture.processTooltip: Clarify the selected items together — one destination, one status
copy.name: name "{title}"
copy.title: title
delete.descContent: Choose what happens to its contents. You can undo this.
delete.itsActions: Its {count, plural, one {# action} other {# actions}}
delete.itsSubProjects: Its {count, plural, one {# sub-project} other {# sub-projects}}
delete.title: Delete “{title}”?
done.deleteSelectedConfirm: {count, plural, one {Delete # selected action?} other {Delete # selected actions?}}
done.emptyHint: Completed actions collect here — you can restore one to Next or move it back to Backlog anytime.
due.emptyHint: Give an action a due date and it shows here, grouped by urgency — overdue, today, this week, later.
editor.deleteConfirmDefault: Delete this? This cannot be undone.
editor.description: Update the title, notes, tags, due date, and status.
editor.dueEndError: The end needs a start date and must be on or after it.
editor.dueTimeError: Use a 24-hour time like 14:30 or 9 — and on the same day the end can’t be before the start.
editor.inheritedTitle: Inherited from a parent project — edit them on that project
editor.pickDueDate: Pick a due date from a calendar
editor.pickEndDate: Pick an end date from a calendar
editor.resourceCompletesAction: Ticking to the goal completes the action (ticking below reopens it)
editor.resourceCountClampWarning: Saving will clamp the count from {current} to {target}
editor.resourceCountUnlimited: Goal, not a cap — keep counting past it
editor.resourceDialogDescription: A link, note, email, or file reference attached to this item.
editor.resourceGuestEditable: Guests can update this on shared pages
focus.allClearHint: Nothing left in this queue. Capture a thought or move an action to Next, then come back.
getStarted.steps: Three steps: Capture anything that's on your mind, Clarify it into a Next action or Backlog, then Focus to actually do it.
goals.emptyHint: Group projects by tag into a board to track progress across them at a glance — your Mission Control. Create one above.
guest.goneBody: The page may have been unpublished or the link replaced. Ask the person who shared it for a fresh one.
guest.goneTitle: This link is no longer active
guest.suggestFailed: Couldn't send right now — try again in a bit.
guest.suggestHint: Have an idea for this plan? Send it along — the organizer decides what makes it in.
guest.suggestPlaceholder: e.g. "A night in a ryokan in Hakone?"
help.gtkArchive: Archive finished projects. Archiving a project (from the Projects view) tucks it away — it and its actions drop out of Next, Backlog, Due, and the project pickers. Use Show archived to bring it back.
help.gtkBookmark: Bookmark what you return to. Use the bookmark icon on a project or a tag filter to pin it to the toolbar as a colored icon — one click jumps you back. Hover a bookmark to remove it. Bookmarks sync with your workspace.
help.gtkFocus: Focus from anywhere. The green glowing button on Next, Backlog, Due, Done, and Inbox drops you into a one-card-at-a-time deck. From a card you can open the editor, rename, copy, delete, or move it to Backlog — and on Done you can re-triage the ones that weren't really done (restore to Next, park in Backlog, or delete).
help.gtkNewItems: Choose where new items land. Each add box has a small top/bottom toggle — flip it right where you add for a here-and-now choice that resets on reload. Set your default in Settings → Preferences.
help.gtkRowActions: Quick row actions. Click an action's title to open it, and use the copy icon on any row to copy its name.
help.gtkTags: Tags rub off. A tag on a project applies to everything inside it — its actions and sub-projects show that tag in italics, and it filters and searches just like a tag you set directly.
help.learnBody: The Learn NAM project is a hands-on tour — real tasks you complete on the project itself to learn each feature.
help.loopCapture: Capture anything on your mind into the Inbox — don't stop to organize.
help.loopClarify: Clarify each inbox item: is it a Next action (do soon), Backlog (later), or a Project (needs steps)? You can also file it straight into an existing project as you clarify.
help.loopFocus: Focus to work through your Next actions one card at a time.
help.scFlip: — flip new items add to top / bottom
help.scGoto: then a letter — go to a view:
help.subtitle: How NAM works, what each view is for, and a few shortcuts.
help.viewBacklog: Things to do later — not now.
help.viewDone: Completed actions — select several to restore or re-triage in bulk.
help.viewDue: Actions with a due date, grouped by urgency.
help.viewFocus: Work one card at a time — enter from Next, Backlog, Due, Done, or Inbox.
help.viewGoals: Tag-grouped boards to track progress (Mission Control).
help.viewNext: The actions you’ve decided to do now.
help.viewProjects: Group related actions; plan bigger outcomes.
help.viewSearch: Find any action or project by title or tag.
help.viewTags: Filter by a context (tag), then Focus just those — and manage your tags.
inbox.deleteSelectedConfirm: {count, plural, one {Delete # selected item?} other {Delete # selected items?}}
inbox.fileIntoTooltip: Choose where the actions below file into (now: {target})
inbox.kindProject: It needs planning — make a project
inbox.processAllTooltip: Work the inbox one item at a time — the deck cycles until it's empty
inbox.processSelectedTooltip: Work just the selected items, one at a time
list.filteredEmpty: {count} item(s) hidden by the status filter
list.filteredEmptyHint: Nothing matches the current boxes — adjust the filter to see them.
nav.calendarHint: Calendar — your dated work, month by month
nav.focusHint: Work through actions one at a time
nav.looseEndsHint: Stalled projects and things gone quiet
nav.moreDesc: Jump to any surface, or manage your session.
nav.projectExplorerHint: Browse the project tree and open one
nav.resizeSidebarTitle: Drag to resize · double-click to reset
nav.sharedHint: Projects you've published as web pages
next.emptyHint: The things you've decided to do now. Add one above, or capture a thought and process it to Next.
picker.description: Click a project to open its sub-projects; pick a destination.
projects.emptyHint: Group related actions into a project — plan bigger outcomes with sub-projects, a workbench, and progress at a glance.
resourceType.QUESTION: Question
review.allClearHint: Every project has a next action, and nothing's gone quiet.
review.goneQuietHint: Open for a while, with no recent activity.
review.stalledHint: No next action — decide one, or close them out.
settings.addBottomTip: New items add to the bottom (tap, or press t, for top)
settings.addTopTip: New items add to the top (tap, or press t, for bottom)
settings.denseModeHelp: Hide the labels next to the toolbar and sidebar icons once you know your way around — tooltips still name everything.
settings.labsHelp: Show features still being built. Off by default; nothing here is final.
settings.languageHelp: Choose the app's language. Date format stays a separate preference.
share.buttonTooltip: Share this project as a web page
share.description: Publishing creates a secret link that shows this project as a friendly web page — anyone with the link can see it, no account needed. The page shows a snapshot: republish after changes.
share.dirtyHint: The project changed since the last publish — republish to update the page.
share.guestTicks: New guest ticks since your last look: {count}
share.invisibleToGuests: {count} item(s) guests can’t see yet — republish to reveal
share.notPublished: Not published. Publish to get a secret link.
share.rotateConfirm: Replace the link? The old link stops working immediately.
share.suggestionProvenance: Suggested by {name} on the shared page ({date}).
share.title: Share as a web page
share.trayNearFull: The tray is nearly full ({count} of 500) — guests are refused at the cap; To inbox or Dismiss frees space
share.unpublishConfirm: Unpublish? The link stops working immediately.
share.vanished: This share was unpublished on another device — the link is gone. Publish again if you want a new one.
shared.emptyHint: Open a project and use Share to publish it as a guest-friendly web page — it'll show up here.
shared.title: Shared
summary.description: Markdown summary of this project's actions — copy and paste anywhere.
summary.discardMessage: The edited Markdown hasn't been copied anywhere — closing throws it away.
summary.regenerateTooltip: Discard edits and return to the generated summary
summary.title: Summary — {title}
sync.reconciledFromDevice: A newer change from another device was applied here.
sync.saveFailed: Couldn’t save your last change. Check your connection, then retry.

tags.filterHintAfter: just those, or save the selection as a view.
tags.filterHintBefore: Select a tag to filter — then
tags.inProgressOn: Working on it — click to clear
templates.emptyHint: On a project’s workbench, “Save as template…” captures its structure — then apply it to spin up similar projects in one click.
templates.useAria: Create a project from the {name} template
